steps.title: Identify what to substitute
steps.content: The equation is $s = 50 + 4t$ where $s$ is speed in mph and $t$ is time in seconds. We need the speed at $t = 5$ seconds, so substitute $t = 5$ into the equation.

steps.title: Substitute and evaluate
steps.content: $$s = 50 + 4(5)$$ $$s = 50 + 20$$ $$s = 70$$ The speed is 70 miles per hour. That matches choice D — D is correct.
